Biography

zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Corbet於1116年1月13日出生在英國史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛時，他的父親William Corbet Lord of Worthen27歲，母親Isabel de Valletort27歲。他於1135年之前與Margaret de Brampton在英國史洛普爾朋特斯波利結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1165年6月12日在英國史洛普爾朋特斯波利享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon Corbet于1116年1月13日出生在英国史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛时，他的父亲William Corbet Lord of Worthen27岁，母亲Isabel de Valletort27岁。他于1135年之前与Margaret de Brampton在英国史洛普爾朋特斯波利结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1165年6月12日在英国史洛普爾朋特斯波利享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Corbet was born on 13 January 1116, in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, his father, William Corbet Lord of Worthen, was 27 and his mother, Isabel de Valletort, was 27. He married Margaret de Brampton before 1135, in Pontesbury, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 12 June 1165, in Pontesbury, Shropshire, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon Corbet est né le 13 janvier 1116, à Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, William Corbet Lord of Worthen, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Valletort, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Brampton avant 1135, à Pontesbury, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 12 juin 1165, à Pontesbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon Corbet am 13. Januar 1116 in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Corbet Lord of Worthen 27 und seine Mutter Isabel de Valletort 27. Er hat vor 1135 in Pontesbury, Shropshire, England Margaret de Brampton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Juni 1165 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Pontesbury, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Corbet è nato il il 13 gennaio 1116 nel Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, William Corbet Lord of Worthen, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Valletort, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Brampton prima del 1135, nel Pontesbury, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 12 giugno 1165, nel Pontesbury, Shropshire, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon Corbetが1116年1月13日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアワットレスボロウで生まれた時，父William Corbet Lord of Worthenは27歳，母Isabel de Valletortは27歳であった。1135年以前にイギリスシュロプシュアイアポンテスブリーでMargaret de Bramptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1165年6月12日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアポンテスブリーで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Corbet(이)가 1116년 1월 13일 영국 슈럽실르 왓틀레스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Corbet Lord of Worthen(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Valletort(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1135년 이전 영국 슈럽실르 폰츠버이에서 Margaret de Brampton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1165년 6월 12일 영국 슈럽실르 폰츠버이에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Corbet nasceu em 13 de janeiro de 1116, em Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Corbet Lord of Worthen, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Valletort, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Brampton antes 1135, em Pontesbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de junho de 1165, em Pontesbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Corbet родился 13 января 1116 г. в местности ваттлесбороую, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Corbet Lord of Worthen было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Valletort, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Brampton перед 1135 г. в местности понтесбури, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 12 июня 1165 г. в местности понтесбури, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

Se casó con Margaret de Brampton antes de 1135, en Pontesbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 12 de junio de 1165, en Pontesbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años.
